  "claims": [
    "AB 988 laid the groundwork for a more responsive behavioral health safety net.",
    "The Advisory Group is a crucial first step in turning the vision of AB 988 into reality.",
    "988 is the national Suicide Prevention and Mental Health Crisis hotline, serving as an alternative to police response for those in mental health crisis.",
    "The implementation efforts of a 988 emergency mental health hotline reflect California’s recognition of the integral role of mental health in overall healthcare.",
